author: FileIt Team
name: FileIt Module
description: Scaffolds a new FileIt module (Host, App, Test, Integration projects) following the SimpleFlow shape, with EventGrid blob watcher, Service Bus subscriber, dead-letter reader, and standard logging conventions.

QueuePrefix.description: Prefix for Service Bus queues, topics, and blob containers. Lowercase, hyphen-separated. Defaults to lowercased module name. Example: 'trade-recon' for module name 'TradeRecon'.

EventIdBase.description: Starting EventId for this module's logs. Existing modules use: SimpleFlow=2000, DataFlow=3000, Services=1000. Pick a unique 1000-block.

LocalHttpPort.description: Local dev HTTP port for the function host. Existing modules use: SimpleFlow=7060, DataFlow=7061, Services=7062. Pick a unique port.

IncludeWatcher.description: Include the EventGrid blob watcher (SimpleWatcher pattern). Set false for API-receiver-only modules.

IncludeSubscriber.description: Include the Service Bus topic subscriber (SimpleSubscriber pattern).

IncludeDeadLetterReader.description: Include the dead-letter reader function. Required if IncludeSubscriber is true.

IncludeTestSeeder.description: Include the timer-triggered blob seeder for local testing (SimpleTest pattern).
